positive: A highly detailed, intricate celestial botanical design featuring stylized neon bioluminescent flora (e.g., glowing ferns, abstract lotus blossoms) intertwined with cosmic elements. The composition should be centered, symmetrical, and structured like a sophisticated graphic medallion. Incorporate patterns of crescent moons, star trails, and subtle nebula swirls that resemble negative space within the botanical forms. The style must be clean vector art, high-contrast engraving quality, with thick, clean lines and limited, glowing color palette: deep midnight indigo, ethereal cyan, glowing gold, and stark white accents. The entire artwork must be perfectly suited for repeating patterns or single-print placement on dark apparel. Art deco meeting modern tattoo flash. Extremely high resolution, vector aesthetic, graphic novel quality.
negative: blurry, grainy, photograph, realism, 3d render, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, signature, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cluttered, low detail
